panels.description: Wide angle shot looking up from the depths of a dark shaft. Far above, a tiny blue disc of light is visible. The protagonist's hands are visible grabbing onto a ladder, while the shadow of a head (Weena) disappears from the opening. Dark, oppressive atmosphere with mechanical gears visible in deep shadows.

bubbles.text: Weena... gone? I should turn back. I must turn back.

panels.description: Medium shot of the protagonist crawling into a narrow, stone-walled horizontal tunnel. The protagonist looks exhausted, clothes tattered, eyes wide and strained from the darkness. A faint mechanical hum fills the space.

bubbles.text: A loophole... thank god. My body is failing me.

panels.description: Close-up of the protagonist's face as a hand emerges from the darkness to touch his cheek. The protagonist looks startled, eyes darting toward the shadows. High contrast lighting.

Wide shot of a vast, arched cavern revealed by the flickering orange light of a single match. Massive unidentifiable machinery shapes loom in the darkness. The protagonist stands in the center, looking small and vulnerable.

bubbles.text: No answer. I am truly alone here. You are in for it now.

panels.description: Medium close-up showing a white metal table in the foreground with a bloody joint of meat. The protagonist's face enters the frame, looking disgusted and terrified. Stuffy, blood-scented air implied by swirling dust motes.

Tight close-up of the protagonist's hand dropping a burning match. The flame dies out in the foreground, plunging the scene into absolute blackness. Protagonist's expression is one of regret and utter helplessness.

bubbles.text: Foolish... I came here without even a Kodak to see what I was doing.
